title: Lakebase Public Preview enabled by default
body:
The **Lakebase: Managed Postgres OLTP Database** preview is now enabled by default. Users can start creating Lakebase database instances without needing workspace admins to enable this preview first. Admins can disable the preview if needed.

See [Create and manage a database instance](/aws/en/oltp/instances/create) and [Manage Databricks previews](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews).

ref_links.text: Create and manage a database instance
